name: X-Change Walk of Shame
description:
You recently moved to Summer City, and you're still getting used to the ubiquitous availability of X-Change, a drug that changes the user's sex and can also induce a number of side effects, depending on the type of pill. You've got a new job, selling X-Change and other sex changing pills at DynaPill. It pays well, so you've finally got some scratch. Deciding to treat yourself, you head to the Broken Drum, the hottest bar in town to have a good time. You catch a taxi, which navigates the crowded streets. The driver explains there's a street festival celebrating Aphrodite, the city's AI protector, and tonight things are going to get WILD.

But you're in for much, much more than you imagined.

[Based on X-Change™ Life by Aphrodite. TW: CNC, dubcon, forced transformation.]
